videos.title: Dasha, Laura and Franziska in Khanty Mansiysk
videos.transcript:
[Music]
Drachova,
Laura Dalmire in second place, and
Franciscoca Price in third.
Dasha, can you walk us through the
competition today?
Uh, yes. Um,
what could I say about uh all the
competition? Of course, brightest moment
for me is uh one of the brightest uh
this second shooting uh when I choose
wrong position and u I've got very
bright memories from Oberhov but today
uh this tribunes rescue me and I could
say also this experience from Hammanis
helped me today also and uh part of this
victory from today is big part
of these tribunes I think.
What was your strategy before the race
started today? Was it the plan to go out
fast and catch Kaiser right away? Uh you
know uh strategy was just to do my race
my own race and don't think about other
too much and just um run fast and shoot
clean. So to do what I can do. This was
your fourth pursuit victory of the year.
Is that a little bit of a surprise that
you're always winning the pursuit or is
that maybe part of this personality that
likes to come back and win from the
back?
Uh yeah, you know that was quite strange
world championship for me and uh today
I'm very happy to be on a podium and u
yeah it's not surprise it's just very
good feelings.
Laura,
how much fun was it to be battling your
teammate on that last loop? Um, yes, it
was an interesting last loop for us. Um,
first I was in the front, then
afterwards Francisco um goes on the
first position and um then the downhill
we were really um together and on the
last uphill I went on her poles and on
her skis. So it was yeah um u really
hard um last uphill but then um in the
end we had a a little fight and yeah in
the end I was a few meters before her
but we are together on the podium and I
think it's it's really a good day for
the whole German team and for us and yes
it's fun to to be on the podium with a
teammate. Did you ever think about
giving her a little elbow?
No, never.
Perhaps um she wants to give me her
elbow.
Franciscoca, what were you thinking
about on that last loop? Um yes, it was
a strange feeling because I always
thought, oh, she's also Yeah, she's a
good friend of me. So, yeah, it was also
should I Yeah, it was strange. Um, but
I'm very happy about my third place and
I know that that LA is really strong at
the last meters before the finish line.
So, yeah, it doesn't matter.
Has the end of this season been really
special for you after winning this gold
medal and the silver medal at the World
Championships, now being here with your
teammate on the podium? Um, yes, of
course. I never thought that it could be
such a great season like it is now. And
yeah, I just enjoy and it's also very
good for me that we don't have any
pressure now because the world
championships was really good for us and
yeah, now we can just can do bolon and
it's fast skiing and good shooting and
yeah, it makes fun. So, are you all
ready to have a little more fun
tomorrow? Thank you. Yes.
Congratulations. Any further questions?
